input.description: A wide-angle photograph of an elderly man sitting on a bench in front of a newly constructed apartment building. He is wearing a flat cap and looking away from the camera toward an empty lot across the street. The apartment building behind him is modern glass and steel, approximately six stories. The empty lot has a faded sign advertising the previous business.
input.creator: Photographer: Anna Lehmann

input.description: A 4-minute interview clip with a marine biologist discussing coral bleaching. Recorded on location near a research station. Background sounds of waves and boat engines audible.

A 90-second timelapse of the European Parliament hemicycle in Strasbourg filling with MEPs before a plenary vote. Camera is positioned in the press gallery looking down. The hemicycle goes from empty to approximately two-thirds full over the duration. Natural lighting shifts as clouds pass. No audio needed - will be used as B-roll under narration.
input.creator: Camera: Sofia Berger, staff
input.rights: Production owns all rights. Cleared for broadcast and web. Not cleared for stock licensing.
